author: Jdthomas24
description: Monitor device check-in health across Zigbee, Z-Wave, Matter, Hub Mesh, LAN, Virtual and Hub Variable — learns each device's normal pattern and alerts you when something goes quiet.
releaseNotes: v1.4.4 - Maintenance release: internal state persistence improvements. Snooze add/remove/expiry now uses correct top-level state reassignment, guaranteeing snoozes survive hub reboots. Orphaned snooze cleanup during scans now correctly persists the updated map. State change tracking uses a safer local-copy pattern to prevent missed updates. Device history reset now removes stale stateHistory entries cleanly instead of leaving null keys. No user-facing changes — all existing history, health scores, snoozes, and overrides are preserved.
